test_cases.input_summary: Press roundup of coverage of a major tech company's mass layoffs, from 6 outlets across broadsheet, tabloid, business, and tech press
test_cases.notes: Framing analysis was sharp — correctly identified the split between 'business strategy' and 'human impact' frames. Outlier identification was useful. The overview paragraph was a strong standalone summary.

test_cases.input_summary: Press roundup of coverage of a controversial planning decision to build a new airport runway, from 5 national and local outlets
test_cases.notes: Good identification of the environment-vs-economy frame split. Local outlet coverage was correctly highlighted as the outlier with community-level detail. Gaps section correctly noted the absence of freight industry perspective.

test_cases.input_summary: Press roundup of international coverage of a diplomatic incident between two countries, from 4 outlets in different countries
test_cases.notes: Effective at comparing national perspectives on the same event. Attribution was specific throughout. The brief correctly noted how each country's media framed the same facts differently.
